name: index_elemwise_fusion_curated
description: Same index/Elemwise fusion comparison as index_elemwise_fusion (gather_scatter_fusion cb1e83df518d vs its pre-feature parent), but run over a curated set of models where advanced integer indexing is on the hot path so FuseIndexedElemwise actually fires with high op counts. Models picked from the per-model IndexedElemwise op-count report: high-count VAR/missing-data/varying-effects models plus the two proven winners from the default-10 run (multilevel_varying_intercept_slope_ noncentered ~26% and bayesian_var_ireland ~7%). Linalg-dominated models that fire fusion but show no eval delta (lkj_cholesky, gp_marginal) are deliberately excluded.
